description: Perform a steady-state BEM simulation to analyze spanwise aerodynamic loads using the 'Turbine Simulation' sample project located at /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/. Configure the HAWT BEM Simulation for a 'Single Point' analysis with a Wind Speed of 12 m/s and a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 7, including Tip Loss and Hub Loss corrections. Export the resulting spanwise load data (Position vs Normal Force and Tangential Force) to /home/ga/Documents/spanwise_loads.txt. Identify the maximum Normal Force value and record it in /home/ga/Documents/max_load_report.txt using the format 'Max_Fn = <value>'.
